course.title: Building High‑Impact Presentations with Gamma
course.description: Learn how to use Gamma to rapidly create clear, compelling, and visually strong presentations—from first prompt to polished deck—while knowing when and how to hand off to PowerPoint or other tools.
course.summary: Use Gamma to go from idea to presentation-ready in minutes without sacrificing narrative quality.

modules.title: Why Gamma Changes Presentation Work
modules.description: Understand what Gamma is optimized for—and when it outperforms traditional slide tools.

content.html:
From Formatting to Thinking

Most time spent creating presentations is not strategic—it is mechanical. Layout decisions, spacing, visual cleanup, and structural reshuffling consume hours that should be spent on message clarity.

Gamma flips this model. It emphasizes idea-to-structure speed, allowing you to focus first on narrative and intent, and only then refine details.

Great presentations are not slides—they are decisions made visible.

Gamma is optimized for early clarity, fast iteration, and modern, scrollable storytelling rather than pixel‑perfect slide choreography.

lessons.title: Where Gamma Fits in the Toolset

content.html:
Gamma vs. Traditional Slides

NeedBest Tool
Fast narrative framingGamma
Exploratory draftsGamma
Board‑ready precision layoutsPowerPoint
Data-heavy visual controlPowerPoint / Excel
Web-first sharingGamma

High-performing teams use Gamma to think and PowerPoint to finalize—not as competing tools, but as stages in the lifecycle.

questions.text: What primary problem does Gamma solve?

options.text: Formatting and layout speed at the expense of thinking

questions.explanation: Gamma removes layout friction so users can focus on narrative, structure, and message clarity.

modules.title: Creating a Presentation in Gamma
modules.description: Learn a practical, repeatable workflow for building strong presentations in Gamma.
